findings.blocker: whiskerLeft: W g → W (F ◁ g) for the relative module tensor requires MonoidalClosed (PresheafOfModules R₀), VERIFIED ABSENT from Mathlib at the pinned commit (the module analogue of Sites/Monoidal.lean's closed-monoidal apparatus). Genuine multi-file infrastructure gap.

attempts.strategy: Verify the full Localization.Monoidal transport pipeline against Mathlib: infer MonoidalCategory (SheafOfModules R) directly
attempts.lean_error: failed to synthesize instance of type class MonoidalCategory (SheafOfModules R)
attempts.insight: No pre-existing MonoidalCategory instance on SheafOfModules; must build via Localization.Monoidal transport.

attempts.strategy: Probe whether the closed-monoidal apparatus needed for the whiskerLeft reduction exists for presheaves of modules
attempts.lean_error: failed to synthesize instance of type class MonoidalClosed (PresheafOfModules (R ⋙ forget₂ CommRingCat RingCat))
attempts.insight: MonoidalClosed for the relative-ring presheaf-of-modules category is ABSENT. Sites/Monoidal.lean's slick whiskerLeft proof (via Hom(F◁g,H)≃Hom(g,ihom F H) + isSheaf_functorEnrichedHom) cannot be ported without it.

attempts.strategy: Try the ambient J.W (A := AddCommGrpCat) IsMonoidal transport along toPresheaf
attempts.code_tried: transport J.W.IsMonoidal along toPresheaf : PresheafOfModules R₀ ⥤ Cᵒᵖ ⥤ AddCommGrpCat
attempts.lean_error: wrong tensor: J.W whiskering is F ◁_{⊗ℤ} g (levelwise abelian-group tensor), not F ◁_{⊗R} g (relative module tensor)
attempts.insight: Sites/Monoidal.lean's J.W.IsMonoidal is for the ambient ⊗_ℤ on AddCommGrpCat, transported along the NON-monoidal-for-⊗R forgetful toPresheaf. Does not apply to the relative module tensor. DEAD END.

attempts.strategy: Build isMonoidal_W_of_whiskerLeft: reduce MorphismProperty.IsMonoidal W to the single whiskerLeft hypothesis (IsMultiplicative auto; whiskerRight via braiding)
attempts.code_tried: def isMonoidal_W_of_whiskerLeft (hwl : ... W (F ◁ g)) : (...).IsMonoidal where whiskerLeft F _ _ g hg := hwl hg F; whiskerRight {F₁ F₂} f hf G := ((...).arrow_mk_iso_iff (Arrow.isoMk (β_ F₁ G) (β_ F₂ G))).2 (hwl hf G)
attempts.insight: whiskerRight follows from whiskerLeft via the symmetric braiding on PresheafOfModules (arrow_mk_iso_iff with the braiding iso). IsMultiplicative is a free instance from inverseImage of the localizing J.W. Axiom-clean.

attempts.strategy: Build monoidalCategoryOfIsMonoidalW: transport MonoidalCategory (SheafOfModules R) from [IsMonoidal W] via Localization.Monoidal
attempts.code_tried: def monoidalCategoryOfIsMonoidalW [...IsMonoidal] : MonoidalCategory (SheafOfModules R) := inferInstanceAs (MonoidalCategory (LocalizedMonoidal (L := sheafification α) (W := (J.W).inverseImage (toPresheaf _)) (Iso.refl _)))
attempts.insight: Localization.Monoidal.instMonoidalCategoryLocalizedMonoidal applies with the existing relative ⊗_R on PresheafOfModules R₀, the existing sheafification.IsLocalization W, [W.IsMonoidal], and unit iso Iso.refl. Axiom-clean. Together with attempt 4 the whole cone reduces to exactly whiskerLeft.

next_steps: The lone remaining ingredient whiskerLeft (W g → W (F ◁ g)) is now sharply isolated. Discharge option 1 (recommended, large): build MonoidalClosed (PresheafOfModules R₀) — the module analogue of Monoidal/Closed/FunctorCategory — then mirror Sites/Monoidal.lean's isSheaf_functorEnrichedHom + whiskerLeft adjunction reduction; multi-file Mathlib-PR-scale, spin as its own sub-lane. Option 2 (smaller): supply whiskerLeft directly by any flatness-free sectionwise locally-bijective argument, then haveI := isMonoidal_W_of_whiskerLeft hwl; exact monoidalCategoryOfIsMonoidalW α closes monoidalCategory (modulo the syntactic ring-presheaf inferInstanceAs bridge) and cascades to the other 3 sorries. Both new decls are permanent axiom-clean infrastructure the discharge plugs into.
